summary: Test suite covers main requirements (matrix generation, include/exclude, max-parallel, fail-fast, size validation) with well-organized Pester unit tests following TDD cycles. However, rigor is limited: missing edge cases (empty arrays, null values, non-array dimension values), error scenarios (JSON parse failures, invalid config types), and error message validation. Act integration tests depend on external fixture files (fixtures/basic-matrix.json, etc.) not provided, and use fragile regex assertions on output instead of JSON validation. Workflow file referenced but not shown. Would catch most regressions in happy path but miss edge cases and error handling. Assertions like 'PESTER_PASSED: 31' assume specific workflow output format without documented contract.
